overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a cloaked character exploring a vast indoor sci-fi facility with industrial stone architecture. The character traverses a grand hall with holographic displays, crosses an open plaza, ascends a massive central staircase, and navigates through narrow upper corridors with market stalls.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hall with holographic monument and circular balcony

events.description: turning away from green holographic glow into dimmer area of the hall
turning left to navigate around the circular balcony structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the main hall, observing the green holographic statue and passing by the circular balcony structure

notable_agents.action: two figures sitting on a stone bench against the ribbed wall
robed figure holding a white umbrella near the green statue

entered.detail: large glowing green statue of a robed figure mounted on the stone wall
curved stone balcony with metal railings overlooking the hall
built-in stone benches integrated into the ribbed wall
structure with glowing red doorways and dark entrance

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a vast industrial hall dominated by a green holographic statue on the right. Walking forward, they pass stone pillars and turn left around a circular balcony structure. The space features high ceilings with skylights, rusted industrial pipes, and scattered NPCs resting on stone benches.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza leading to grand staircase

events.description: moving from enclosed hall to open plaza area with more natural light
beginning ascent of the wide central staircase
entering bright light beams streaming through upper skylights

agents.ego_description: crossing the open plaza through scattered crowds and ascending the wide central staircase toward the upper level

notable_agents.action: group of robed figures walking across the plaza in various directions
figure descending the grand staircase toward the plaza

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with multiple flights leading upward to the next level
stacked wooden crates and cargo containers suggesting market activity
large rectangular skylights casting dramatic beams of light downward

segments.scene_description: Emerging into a sunlit plaza, the character navigates through moderate crowds of robed NPCs. The grand staircase dominates the center, leading upward into bright skylights. Market crates line the right side while the green holographic statue remains visible in the distant left background.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level industrial corridors and market nook

events.description: reaching top of stairs and entering upper industrial platform with red lighting
entering narrow corridor with close walls and red banner flags
approaching market stall area with goods displayed under canopy

agents.ego_description: navigating through the upper industrial level, passing through narrow corridors and a small market area before ascending the final staircase

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind market stall tending to displayed goods
figure walking up the final staircase ahead of the character

entered.detail: large mechanical equipment with red lighting and industrial details
close stone walls creating a tight passage with metal fencing
wooden stall with fabric canopy displaying various goods and containers
steep stone stairs leading to the next upper level

segments.scene_description: At the top of the stairs, the character enters an industrial upper level with red-lit machinery. The space transitions into narrow corridors with chain-link fencing and a small market stall. The character continues past the vendor and ascends a final steep staircase in the enclosed passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cavernous industrial hall into a sunlit plaza and finally up into a cramped, red-lit upper gallery. It begins by tracking the character past stone pillars and a towering green holographic statue, curving around a circular balcony beneath high ceilings and rusted pipes. As the character emerges from the hall, the environment opens into a bright, crowded plaza where the camera moves past market crates toward a massive central staircase. The scene then shifts from the open sunlight of the plaza to the enclosed industrial upper level, passing red-lit machinery and chain-link fencing. Finally, the camera navigates through a narrow corridor past a small market stall before ascending a steep final staircase.
